! Quantile normalization - makes distributions identical across tissues
temp_col, rank_means, perm, stack_left, stack_right, max_stack)

body: ! Apply log2(x + 1) transformation to stabilize variance
Call to log2_transformation.description: Apply log2(x + 1) transformation to expression data

body: ! Calculate tissue averages by grouping replicates
call calc_tiss_avg_r(n_gene, n_grps, group_s, group_c, input_matrix, output_matrix)
Call to calc_tiss_avg.description: Calculate average expression per tissue group from replicates

body: ! Calculate log2 fold changes between condition and control pairs
call calc_fchange_r(n_genes, n_pairs, control_cols, cond_cols, i_matrix, o_matrix)
Call to calc_fchange.description: Calculate log2 fold changes between condition-control pairs
